message:
feat(demo-showcase): add Kanban Board screen (bd-iuvb.12)

Register new KanbanBoard screen with ScreenId variant, ScreenStates field,
and ScreenMeta registry entry under the Interaction category. Add kanban_board
module with initial implementation. Update chrome.rs to wire up the new screen.
Add screen_snapshots test coverage and update terminal capabilities snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
